title: StepHistoryRecord
description: Single record in the append-only CDCC step-history JSONL log consulted by the H6 PreToolUse Step-Re-Execution Guard. Each line in <plan_dir>/cdcc-step-history.jsonl conforms to this schema.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the step was admitted (allow decision)

step_id.description: Stable operation identifier. For Write/Edit: '<Tool>::<file_path>'. For Bash: 'Bash::<normalized-command-signature>' (PAT-redacted, timestamps/seeds/epoch blobs replaced with placeholders).

hash_of_inputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the structured inputs. Write: content. Edit: JSON of {old, new}. Bash: PAT-redacted command string.

tool.description: PreToolUse tool name. H6 only fires on these three destructive tools per the 2026-04-26 scope decision.

agent_persona.description: Persona slug under whose authority the step was attempted (e.g. 'clauda-the-value-genius', 'claudette-the-code-debugger'). Null when not provided in the PreToolUse payload.

authorized_by.description: Gate reference (e.g. 'gate-44') if this record was admitted as an authorized re-execution. Null for fresh steps.

gate_ref.description: Duplicate of authorized_by retained for forward-compatibility with consumers that key on gate_ref. Null for fresh steps.
